function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not SimpleGraph.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: SimpleGraph[T0]) { SimpleGraph.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[SimpleGraph[T0]](k0) } }[V](empty_graph_adj[V])

goal: is_graph_hom[V, W](f.src, f.dst, f.map) = forall(x0: V, x1: V) { f.src.adj(x0, x1) implies f.dst.adj(f.map(x0), f.map(x1)) }
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T2], x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { not x0.adj(x3, x4) or x1.adj(x2(x3), x2(x4)) } = is_graph_hom[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[V, W](f.src, f.dst, f.map)

goal: is_graph_hom[V, W](h, k, f) = forall(x0: V, x1: V) { h.adj(x0, x1) implies k.adj(f(x0), f(x1)) }
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T2], x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { not x0.adj(x3, x4) or x1.adj(x2(x3), x2(x4)) } = is_graph_hom[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[V, W](h, k, f)

goal: is_graph_hom[U, V](g, h, e) = forall(x0: U, x1: U) { g.adj(x0, x1) implies h.adj(e(x0), e(x1)) }

is_graph_hom[U, V](g, h, e)

function(x0: U, x1: U) { not (g.adj(x0, x1) and not h.adj(e(x0), e(x1))) }(x, y)

(forall(x0: V, x1: V) { not h.adj(x0, x1) or k.adj(f(x0), f(x1)) } = true)

goal: compose[U, V, W](f, e, x) = f(e(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[U, V, W](f, e, x)

goal: compose[U, V, W](f, e, y) = f(e(y))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[U, V, W](f, e, y)

goal: k.adj(compose[U, V, W](f, e, x), compose[U, V, W](f, e, y))

proof: function[T0, T2](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T2], x2: T0 -> T2) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T0) { not x0.adj(x3, x4) or x1.adj(x2(x3), x2(x4)) } = is_graph_hom[T0, T2](x0, x1, x2) }[U, W](g, k, compose[U, V, W](f, e))

function[T0, T1](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T1], x2: T0 -> T1) { (is_graph_hom[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and reflects_graph_adj[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2)) = is_graph_embedding[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[V, W](g, h, f)

function[T0, T1](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T1], x2: T0 -> T1) { (is_graph_hom[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and reflects_graph_adj[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2)) = is_graph_embedding[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[V, W](g, h, f)

function[T0, T1](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T1], x2: T0 -> T1) { (is_graph_hom[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and reflects_graph_adj[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x2)) = is_graph_embedding[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[V, W](g, h, f)

function[T0, T1](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T1], x2: T0 -> T1) { not is_graph_embedding[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or (is_graph_hom[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and reflects_graph_adj[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x2)) }[V, W](g, h, f)
function[T0, T1](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T1], x2: T0 -> T1) { not is_graph_embedding[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x2) }[V, W](g, h, f)

goal: is_graph_iso_pair[V, W](g, h, f, e) = (is_graph_hom[V, W](g, h, f) and is_graph_hom[W, V](h, g, e) and are_inverse_vertex_maps[V, W](f, e))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { (is_graph_hom[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and is_graph_hom[T1, T0](x1, x0, x3) and are_inverse_vertex_maps[T0, T1](x2, x3)) = is_graph_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[V, W](g, h, f, e)

goal: are_inverse_vertex_maps[V, W](f, e) = (forall(x0: V) { e(f(x0)) = x0 } and forall(x1: W) { f(e(x1)) = x1 })
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 }) = are_inverse_vertex_maps[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[V, W](e, f)

goal: forall(x0: W) { f(e(x0)) = x0 } and forall(x1: V) { e(f(x1)) = x1 }

proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 }) = are_inverse_vertex_maps[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[W, V](f, e)

goal: is_graph_iso_pair[W, V](h, g, e, f) = (is_graph_hom[W, V](h, g, e) and is_graph_hom[V, W](g, h, f) and are_inverse_vertex_maps[W, V](e, f))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: SimpleGraph[T0], x1: SimpleGraph[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { (is_graph_hom[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) and is_graph_hom[T1, T0](x1, x0, x3) and are_inverse_vertex_maps[T0, T1](x2, x3)) = is_graph_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[W, V](h, g, e, f)
